title: Regime transition aggressive_buying → undefined detected
claim: A transition from aggressive_buying to undefined has been observed. Following this pattern historically, the market tends to exhibit lower volatility and tighter spreads for at least 2 hours.
mechanism: Extreme regimes exhaust the directional participants; the subsequent resting phase reflects informed market-maker re-entry.

title: Regime transition aggressive_selling → undefined detected
claim: A transition from aggressive_selling to undefined has been observed. Following this pattern historically, the market tends to exhibit lower volatility and tighter spreads for at least 2 hours.
mechanism: Extreme regimes exhaust the directional participants; the subsequent resting phase reflects informed market-maker re-entry.

title: Regime transition aggressive_selling → resting_liquidity detected
claim: A transition from aggressive_selling to resting_liquidity has been observed. Following this pattern historically, the market tends to exhibit lower volatility and tighter spreads for at least 2 hours.
mechanism: Extreme regimes exhaust the directional participants; the subsequent resting phase reflects informed market-maker re-entry.

title: Regime transition aggressive_selling → aggressive_buying detected
claim: A transition from aggressive_selling to aggressive_buying has been observed. Following this pattern historically, the market tends to exhibit lower volatility and tighter spreads for at least 2 hours.
mechanism: Extreme regimes exhaust the directional participants; the subsequent resting phase reflects informed market-maker re-entry.

title: Correlation break (HYPE,ETH) — continuation_candidate
claim: Rolling correlation between HYPE and ETH broke below 0.3 (rho=0.025) alongside rising aggression bursts; divergence likely to continue while directional pressure persists.
mechanism: Directional flow in one asset while the other remains passive mechanically reduces contemporaneous correlation; the break continues until the momentum exhausts or the other asset follows.
